subject: [PATCH v5 06/21] mm: swap: add a separate type for physical swap slots

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new type, swp_slot_t, to represent physical swap slots on swap devices. It separates the logical view of swap entries from their physical backing state, allowing for future virtualization and dynamic allocation of swap slots. The mapping between the two types is currently an identity mapping, but will be used in later patches to associate swapped-out pages with a backing store.
